accepted_status_schema.accepted_semantics: Evidence is sufficient for the named local command or Provider Runtime live-smoke path. It does not claim Agent Runtime, Memory Runtime, A2A, or Campaign 6+ completion.
accepted_status_schema.warning_boundary_semantics: Command completed with intentional warning semantics such as cost guard or no-network live-smoke boundary.
accepted_status_schema.blocked_semantics: Execution must stop because a secret, network opt-in, or configuration prerequisite is missing or unsafe.
accepted_status_schema.partial_semantics: Existing command evidence is reusable but does not prove the full live runtime path.
accepted_status_schema.failed_semantics: Contract, security, or command evidence is missing or explicitly failed.

removal_requires: Owner accepts this bridge status schema delta
Provider Runtime Final Live Smoke Reacceptance passes
UI binding receives accepted provider status evidence without secrets
Owner explicitly authorizes UI yellow marker removal

bridge_consumption_contract.existing_bridge_boundary: Provider Runtime acceptance is env-only and opt-in. Raw secrets must stay outside UI bridge requests.
bridge_consumption_contract.rollback_disable_switch: Unset provider env or network opt-in; UI must show degraded/offline local continuation instead of silently failing.

user_facing_status_matrix.user_message: Provider connected; external Provider calls may run only with explicit opt-in.
Provider unavailable; local Knowledge Base, retrieval over local evidence, and document workflows continue.
Provider key is missing from secure environment variables; plaintext keys are never shown.
Provider request timed out; retry is allowed within policy and local workflows continue.
Fallback was used; show fallback reason and avoid presenting mock/offline output as production Provider output.
External Provider call blocked by cost/token guard; local workflows continue.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Default provider templates validate with no inline secret.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Can support UI readiness display, but cannot remove Provider yellow marker alone.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Provider templates and profile readiness are present; clean workspace falls back to disabled mock readiness.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Can support UI readiness display, but cannot enable external provider actions.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Env-only provider config passes and inline secret fixture fails closed; redaction output is masked.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Can support security boundary display; raw secrets still must not enter UI or bridge requests.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Missing base URL or API key blocks execution with network_called=false.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Yellow marker remains until accepted credentials and opt-in live smoke policy are approved.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Invalid-key fallback is simulated with network_called=false; no real invalid credential integration was run.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Cannot remove yellow marker without final acceptance of simulation scope or real invalid-key evidence.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Timeout fallback is simulated with network_called=false; full request timeout runtime evidence is not present.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Cannot remove yellow marker without final acceptance of simulation scope or real timeout evidence.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Provider-error fallback is simulated; unavailable real endpoint behavior was not exercised.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Cannot remove yellow marker without final acceptance of simulation scope or real unavailable-provider evidence.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Fallback simulations pass for the existing command set; this does not prove full live runtime fallback.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Can support fallback matrix display; cannot enable Provider Runtime without final acceptance.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Cancellation is represented as provider_operation_cancelled with cancelled=true, retryable=false, fallback_used=false, and network_called=false.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Can support cancellation behavior display; cannot remove Provider yellow marker without approved live smoke and final acceptance.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Over-limit and unknown-pricing inputs produce warning semantics, not a false pass.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Can support cost guard display; cannot enable live provider execution.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Owner-approved opt-in live provider smoke passed with env-only configuration, HTTP 200, response hash committed, response text not committed, and no API key leak.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Provider Runtime yellow marker may be removed by the UI binding gate only. Other yellow markers remain unchanged.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Final live smoke blocker is cleared for Provider Runtime. Secret/API key UI remains masked/display-only.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Allows only Provider Runtime marker update from disabled_boundary to enabled_real.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: /models, /chat/completions, and /responses probes passed with HTTP 200; response text is not committed and raw secrets are not displayed.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Allows Provider Runtime to remain enabled_real while requiring explicit network opt-in and masked secrets.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: When provider is unavailable, missing, timed out, fallback-used, or cost-blocked, user-facing UI must keep local KB/document/offline workflows available with clear error, retry guidance, and log id.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Does not remove any non-Provider yellow marker.

runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: This fixture freezes UI/Bridge interpretation of accepted provider evidence while keeping raw secrets outside UI requests.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: Provider Runtime marker is updated; non-Provider yellow markers remain unchanged.

runtime_behavior_matrix.existing_command_evidence: rg scans over reports, fixture, and UI provider markers
runtime_behavior_matrix.semantics: Provider Runtime acceptance, Agent Runtime, Memory Runtime, Collaboration, and A2A are not claimed complete.
runtime_behavior_matrix.removal_rule: No UI marker change is authorized by this scan.
